# integrationMicrosoftPersonalConnect

Connects the user's personal Microsoft account to Linear.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`IntegrationPayload`](../objects/integration_payload-object.md)!

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| `redirectUri` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The Microsoft OAuth redirect URI. |
